title: VCraft
description: VCraft is a NeoForge 1.21.1 mod inspired by The Boys, adding Compound V-style powers, custom lab machines, Temp V, Supe Flight, powered mobs, custom sounds, particles, and a full progression system.
body:
VCraft is a NeoForge 1.21.1 Minecraft mod inspired by The Boys. It adds a full Compound V-style power system, custom lab machines, temporary powers, powered mobs, and superhero-style abilities.

## Features
VCraft adds a full lab-based crafting chain instead of simply handing you powers through one basic recipe.

You will work through custom machines and materials to create:

Raw Biological Matter
Base Serum
Temp V
Compound V
Cure V
VCraft Power Cell
Anti-Supe Alloy
Anti-Supe Baton
Anti-Supe Sword

Compound V is obtained through the machine progression system, not by simple crafting-table shortcuts. VCraft includes custom machines with their own UI, energy system, and processing chain:

Chemical Centrifuge
Molecular Stabilizer
Cryogenic Infuser
Powers
Compound V can grant a random permanent power. Some powers are stronger than others, and some are more dangerous.

### Current powers include:

Homelander
Starlight
A-Train
Soldier Boy
Stormfront
Firecracker
Teleport
Invincible
Kimiko
Godolkin
Oh Father
Vector Manipulation
Size Shifter
Head Popper
Black Noir
Queen Maeve
The Deep
Translucent

Each power has its own effects, strengths, and abilities.

### Invincible

Invincible adds destructive high-speed flight, terrain smashing, impact shockwaves, sonic flight visuals, and a grab/throw combat ability. Grabbed mobs can be held visually in the player’s hand, thrown into blocks or enemies, and damaged on impact.



### Anti-Supe Weapons

VCraft adds Anti-Supe Alloy, Anti-Supe Baton, and Anti-Supe Sword. These weapons are designed specifically for fighting powered enemies and apply increased damage, weakness, and slowness to supes.


### Structures

VCraft adds abandoned Vought-themed world structures with loot and danger:

Abandoned Vought Lab

Vought Camp

These structures can contain VCraft materials, Temp V, Cure V, Power Cells, Anti-Supe gear, and rare Compound V.

## Temp V
Temp V grants a random temporary power for 10 minutes.

It is useful, but unstable. If you use Compound V while Temp V is active, the temporary effect is removed first. If you use another Temp V while one is already active, the old temporary power is replaced.

## Powered Mobs
Mobs have a small chance to spawn with VCraft powers.

Powered mobs may gain passive buffs or use special abilities depending on the power they receive, including lasers, lightning, light blasts, explosions, invisibility, and more.

## Configuration
VCraft includes server-side configuration through _config/compoundv-server.toml._

Server owners can tune damage values, cooldowns, ability ranges, Compound V roll chances, powered mob spawn chance, and other gameplay values.

## Commands

/vcraft power
Shows your current VCraft power.

/vcraft power <player>
Shows another player's current VCraft power. Requires permission level 2.

/vcraft remove
Removes your current VCraft power.

/vcraft remove <player>
Removes another player's current VCraft power. Requires permission level 2.

/vcraft set <player> <power>
Sets a player's VCraft power. Requires permission level 2.

Alias:
/compoundv can also be used instead of /vcraft.
